info.name: Fitness Tracker API - Seeded Local
info.description:
Generated from api/server.go.
Run the Auth/Login seeded admin request first, or run the collection from the top.
Seeded default credentials: alex@example.com / password123.
Manual/destructive endpoints are included but disabled by default.

exec: pm.test("response is not an unexpected server error", function () {
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("sessionId", arr[0].id);

request.description:
POST /v1/auth/2fa/setup

Manual or destructive: included for endpoint coverage, but disabled by default so collection runs do not mutate auth/account state unexpectedly.

POST /v1/auth/2fa/verify

Manual or destructive: included for endpoint coverage, but disabled by default so collection runs do not mutate auth/account state unexpectedly.

Manual or destructive: included for endpoint coverage, but disabled by default so collection runs do not mutate auth/account state unexpectedly.

exec: const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("userId", arr[0].id);

request.description:
POST /v1/rag/cache/clear

Manual or destructive: included for endpoint coverage, but disabled by default so collection runs do not mutate cache state unexpectedly.

exec: const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("exerciseId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("weightEntryId", arr[0].id);

if (pm.response.code === 201) { const w = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set("createdWorkoutId", w.id); if (w.workout_exercises?.[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("createdWorkoutExerciseId", w.workout_exercises[0].id); if (w.workout_exercises?.[0]?.workout_sets?.[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("createdWorkoutSetId", w.workout_exercises[0].workout_sets[0].id); }
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("workoutId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("workoutExerciseId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("workoutSetId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("cardioId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("templateId", arr[0].id);
if (data.weeks && data.weeks[0] && data.weeks[0].sessions && data.weeks[0].sessions[0]) pm.environment.set("programSessionId", data.weeks[0].sessions[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("mealId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("foodId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("mealFoodId", arr[0].id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("recipeId", arr[0].id);

request.description:
GET /v1/admin/users/stats

Response includes goal_breakdown buckets as objects with goal and count keys.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); const u = (json.users || []).find(x => x.email === "sarah@example.com") || (json.users || [])[0]; if (u?.id) pm.environment.set("targetUserId", u.id);
const resp = pm.response.json(); const arr = resp.data || resp; if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[0]?.id) pm.environment.set("notificationId", arr[0].id);
